variants.title: Fleetguard FS19930 Fuel Filter/Water Separator | Replaces the Donaldson P550436
variants.description: Fleetguard® FS19930 premium fuel water separator spin-on works to remove water and other particulates and ensures clean fuel is delivered to your engine.

variants.title: Donaldson P550436 Fuel Filter, Water Separator Spin-On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550436 Fuel Filter, Water Separator Spin-On is designed to remove contaminants and separate water from diesel fuel, safeguarding your engine against corrosion and injector damage. It ensures clean fuel delivery, enhancing engine efficiency and supporting reliable performance in diesel applications. The spin-on design allows for quick and easy installation, reducing maintenance time and costs. This filter is essential for maintaining fuel system integrity, making it ideal for a variety of industrial and mobile equipment operating in challenging environments.
